Dividing both sides of this inequality by 9 yields x plus 8, is greater than or equal to 30, so x is greater than or equal to 22. Therefore, the least number of hours Ken must work the rest of the week to save at least \$270 for the week is 22. Choices A and B are incorrect because Ken can save \$270 by working fewer hours than 38 or 33 for the rest of the week. Choice D is incorrect.
